_comment: ITSM input contract. resolve.py and /new-task both read this. Distinct from schema.json (Dynatrace Settings 2.0 schema).

_flags.required: user MUST provide a value (no default)
_flags.suggested: ask the user, show the default as a hint, allow them to skip
_flags.(neither): fully optional — /new-task does not need to ask

appName.prompt: Which application is this alert for? (used in the alert name prefix)

env.description: Environment label used in the alert name prefix.

serviceName.prompt: Which Dynatrace service do you want to monitor? (use the display name shown in Dynatrace, e.g. 'Tomcat/localhost')
serviceName.description: Dynatrace service display name. Resolved to SERVICE-xxx by resolve.py.

degradationMs.prompt: Alert when median response time is above how many milliseconds? (default 100)
degradationMs.description: Median response time threshold in ms (5-minute window).

slowestDegradationMs.prompt: Alert when the slowest 10% of requests are above how many milliseconds? (default 1000)
slowestDegradationMs.description: Slowest-10% response time threshold in ms (5-minute window).

requestsPerMinute.prompt: Minimum traffic in requests/min before this alert kicks in? (default 10 — prevents false alarms on idle services)

minutesAbnormalState.prompt: How many minutes must the threshold be exceeded before alerting? (1-60, default 1)
minutesAbnormalState.description: How long the abnormal state must persist.

sensitivity.prompt: Alert sensitivity — low / medium / high? (default low)
